scripts.flutter:android:setup: cd spill_flutter && ../.tooling/flutter/bin/flutter create --platforms=android . && echo 'Android platform added. Update android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml with: <meta-data android:name="com.google.android.geo.API_KEY" android:value="${GOOGLE_API_KEY}" />'
scripts.flutter:ios:setup: cd spill_flutter && ../.tooling/flutter/bin/flutter create --platforms=ios . && echo 'iOS platform added. Add MAPS_API_KEY=\${GOOGLE_API_KEY} to ios/Runner/GeneratedPluginRegistrant.m during build'
